---
title: "scalably tracking<br>global neurodevelopment<br>via pitch sensitivity"
subtitle: "CoCoSci Lab Meeting"
author: "-<br>Courtney B. Hilton"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles.scss]
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    center-title-slide: true
    auto-stretch: false
    css: [research-program-styles.css]
    template-partials:
      - title-slide.html
    includes:
      after-body: research-program-viz.html 
resources:
  - research-program-viz.js
  - research-program-styles.css
filters:
  - slide-wrapper.lua
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#000F46"
  data-background-size: contain
date: 2026-03-13
date-format: long
title-logo: "./media/logos/melb.png"
---

![](media/images/collage_people.png){width="90%" .abs-center}
---

![](media/images/uni_students.jpg){width="80%" .abs-center}

---

![Henrich, Heine, Norenzayan, 2010, *BBS*](media/images/weird.png){width="60%" .abs-center}

---

![Chiao, 2009, *In Progress in Brain Research*](media/images/Chiao_2009.png){width="80%" .abs-center}
---

![7 Telsa MRI Scanner (~$14,000,000)](media/images/mri.avif){width="80%" .abs-center}

---

![Kimberly et al., 2023, *Nature Reviews Bioengineering*](media/images/lf-mri.png){width="80%" .abs-center}

---

![Bethlehem et al., 2022, *Nature*](media/images/brain-chart.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![NCD Risk Factor Collaboration, 2016, *eLife*](media/images/height.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

---

![De Onis et al., 2012, *Public Health Nutrition*](media/images/growth-chart.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

---

![Bogin, 2020, *Patterns of Human Growth, Third Edition*](media/images/biocultural.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

---

![Atari, Henrich, Schulz, 2025, *Nature Human Behaviour*](media/images/atari.png){width="80%" .abs-center}

## introducing my new MRI machine... {.title-center .bit-smaller}

---

![](media/images/piano1.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/piano2.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/piano3.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/piano4.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

```{=html}
{{< include td-demo.html >}}
```

---

![](media/images/td-feedback.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/td-game.png){width="60%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/participant_map.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/processing1.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/processing2.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/processing3.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/fig2a.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![Bethlehem et al., 2022, *Nature*](media/images/brain-chart.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/wm-trajectory.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/fig2b.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/fig2a.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/fig2c.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/fig2d.png){width="70%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/figure2.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

## why? {.title-center}

---

![](media/figures/proxy-identification.png){width="100%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/images/charlie.webp){width="70%" .abs-center}

## what can we do with this? {.title-center}

---

![](media/figures/income_plot.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/SESplot.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/sex-diff-whitematter.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/sex-diff-shift.png){width="65%" .abs-center}

---

![](media/figures/countryGenderDiff.png){width="55%" .abs-center}

---

![Bogin, 2020, *Patterns of Human Growth, Third Edition*](media/images/biocultural.png){width="90%" .abs-center}

---

::: {.quote-slide}

![](media/images/tanner.jpg)

> “[human growth] reflects rather accurately the material and moral conditions of that society”
>
> — James Tanner

:::

---


## thanks!!

![](media/logos/arc.jpg){width="50%" .abs-center}


---

![](media/figures/figure1.png){width="80%" .abs-center}



```{=html}
<script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.4.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="research-program-viz.js"></script>
<!-- <script type="text/javascript" src="zoomer.js"></script> -->
<script type="text/javascript" src="audio_player.js"></script>
```
